title: CI-RED-016-B: materialize endpoint consumer map
intent: Turn CI-RED-016 from a raw 1181 static-router-decorator concern into a structured, reviewable consumer map. The change adds a deterministic utility that inventories the live mounted FastAPI surface, scans first-party consumer references, classifies endpoint lanes, and commits JSON/Markdown audit artifacts. It does not delete, rename, consolidate, add, remove, or re-baseline any endpoint.
behavior_change: none - audit/tooling/docs only; runtime API behavior and CI ratchets are unchanged

diff_articulation.what_changed: Adds build_endpoint_consumer_map.py, focused unit tests, a generated machine-readable endpoint_consumer_map.json, a generated Markdown audit summary, and SPRINTS bookkeeping for CI-RED-016-B. The utility flattens FastAPI 0.137 _IncludedRouter route objects, cross-checks against app.openapi() operations, scans first-party text references, and classifies endpoint lanes plus primary consumer classes.
diff_articulation.why_not_redundant: Existing endpoint utilities only count decorators or compare static baseline drift. They do not answer which mounted endpoints have frontend, SDK, backend, test, CI, docs, or no first-party consumer evidence. CI-RED-016 needs that consumer map before any consolidation target can be chosen without broad route churn.

commands_run: python -m venv .venv using Python 3.11; pip install -r requirements.txt -r requirements-dev.txt
python scripts/build_endpoint_consumer_map.py -> mounted endpoint operations 1132, static decorator count 1181

files.intent: Deterministic endpoint consumer-map builder: live mounted endpoint inventory, first-party consumer scan, lane classification, JSON/Markdown output.
Unit tests for endpoint literal extraction, parameterized path matching, consumer-file classification, _IncludedRouter flattening, lane classification, and protective no-consumer notes.
Generated machine-readable CI-RED-016-B endpoint consumer map.
Generated human-readable summary of endpoint lanes, consumer classes, mounted/static gap, and next-step guidance.
Record CI-RED-016-B completion while keeping CI-RED-016 open for future consolidation work.
Dev-ready handoff that scoped the endpoint consumer-map pass and its boundaries.
